entry.title: klashcard Privacy Policy
entry.summary: Privacy Policy kvpratama built the klashcard app as an Open Source app. This SERVICE is provided by kvpratama at no cost and is intended for use as is. This page is used to inform visitors regarding my policies with the collection, use, and disclosure of Personal Information if anyone decided to use my Service. If you choose to use my Service, then you agree to the collection and use of info...

entry.title: Seeds of Hope (Jane Goodall)
entry.summary: Location 306-307 Added on Saturday, August 7, 2021 3:07:13 PM the authors reckon that as many as 86 percent of all plant and animal species on land, and up to 91 percent in the seas, remain unnamed. entry.title: Ikigai: The Japanese Secret to a Long and Happy Life

link.title: Ikigai: The Japanese Secret to a Long and Happy Life

entry.summary: Location 160-160 Added on Sunday, July 25, 2021 10:01:11 PM ikigai-what a French philosopher might call a raison d’etre. Location 657-659 Added on Tuesday, July 27, 2021 9:50:11 PM What makes us enjoy doing something so much that we forget about whatever worries we might have while we do it? When are we happiest? entry.title: Principles: Life and Work (Ray Dalio)
entry.summary: Location 755-756 Added on Thursday, February 25, 2021 9:58:15 PM I saw that to do exceptionally well you have to push your limits and that, if you push your limits, you will crash and it will hurt a lot. You will think you have failed-but that won’t be true unless you give up. Location 976-977 Added on Thursday, February 25, 2021 10:33:27...

entry.summary: Location 259-260 Added on Tuesday, December 15, 2020 8:50:15 PM if you broke down everything you could think of that goes into riding a bike, and then improve it by 1 percent, you will get a significant increase when you put them all together.’ Location 282-283 Added on Tuesday, December 15, 2020 8:54:00 PM Why do small impro...
